message:
fix: follow-up refinements across actor, websocket, rate-limiter, postgres, and tests

actor.rs, gen_server.rs: Refine stop/abort drain loop to handle edge
cases where the mailbox closes between the state check and the recv
call, preventing a spurious panic on unexpected channel state.

combinator/rate_limit.rs: Guard against division-by-zero when
period_millis is 0 in SlidingWindowRateLimiter's cleanup and
wait_duration logic. A zero period means the window never expires, so
skip eviction and return Duration::MAX for retry delay.

database/postgres.rs: Add cancel_in_flight() helper that marks the
connection as closed before returning Outcome::Cancelled, preventing
subsequent operations from attempting to decode partial protocol
messages on a cancelled connection. Add cancellation checkpoint inside
the query row-reading loop.

grpc/health.rs: Minor style adjustment in watcher logic.

messaging/kafka.rs: Additional test refinements for async send paths.

net/websocket/{client,server,split}.rs: Minor adjustments to the
zero-copy write path from the previous commit — fix buffer advance
edge case when poll_write returns zero bytes written.

runtime/reactor/token.rs: Adjust test constant for consistency.

tests/grpc_production_features.rs: Reorganize test structure and update
assertions for the new HealthWatcher semantics.

tests/tokio_t6_migration_packs.rs: Update migration pack test
assertions to match current API surface after builder additions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
